zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Livingston of Drumry and Easter Wemyss於大約1434年出生在蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾德盧姆利時，他的父親William Livingstone of Salcoats38歲，母親Euphemia de Wemyss24歲。他和Christian Preston至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1494年2月7日之後在英國蘇格蘭費伏。

nameMeanings.name: Livingston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Lothian, originally named in Middle English as Levingston. The placename derives from the Middle English personal name Leving (genitive Levinges) + Middle English, Older Scots toun ‘town, village, settlement’.
Irish: surname adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Ó Duinnshléibhe and Mac Duinnshléibhe (see Dunleavy ).

variants.name: Dunleavy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Aidan, Connor, John Patrick, Siobhan.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Duinnshléibhe or Ó Duinnshléibhe ‘son of Donn Sléibhe’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + sléibhe ‘of the mountain’, meaning ‘chieftain (literally, brown one) of the mountain’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Livingston of Drumry and Easter Wemyss was born about 1434, in Drumry, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, his father, William Livingstone of Salcoats, was 38 and his mother, Euphemia de Wemyss, was 24. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Christian Preston. He died after 7 February 1494, in Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Livingston of Drumry and Easter Wemyss est né environ 1434, à Drumry, Dunbartonshire, Écosse, son père, William Livingstone of Salcoats, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Euphemia de Wemyss, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Christian Preston. Il est décédé après 7 février 1494, à Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Livingston of Drumry and Easter Wemyss um 1434 in Drumry, Dunbartonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Livingstone of Salcoats 38 und seine Mutter Euphemia de Wemyss 24. Er hatte mit Christian Preston mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 7. Februar 1494 in Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Livingston of Drumry and Easter Wemyss è nato il circa 1434 nel Drumry, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, il suo padre, William Livingstone of Salcoats, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Euphemia de Wemyss, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Christian Preston. Morì dopo il 7 febbraio 1494, nel Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Livingston of Drumry and Easter Wemyssが約1434年にスコットランドダンバートンシュアイアドルムリーで生まれた時，父William Livingstone of Salcoatsは38歳，母Euphemia de Wemyssは24歳であった。彼はChristian Prestonとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1494年2月7日以後にイギリススコットランドフィフで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Livingston of Drumry and Easter Wemyss(이)가 대략 1434년 스컷랜드 던바토실르 드럼리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Livingstone of Salcoats(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Euphemia de Wemyss(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Christian Preston(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1494년 2월 7일 이후 영국 스코틀랜드 피프에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Livingston of Drumry and Easter Wemyss nasceu aproximadamente 1434, em Drumry, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, seu pai, William Livingstone of Salcoats, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Euphemia de Wemyss, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Christian Preston. Ele faleceu após 7 de fevereiro de 1494, em Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Livingston of Drumry and Easter Wemyss родился около 1434 г. в местности друмри, дунбартоншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени William Livingstone of Salcoats было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Euphemia de Wemyss, 24. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Christian Preston. Он умер после 7 февраль 1494 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания.
